_meta.purpose: Per-slot 'load score' used by the fatigue index. Higher = more demanding shift.

rationale.5: High-stress, high-public-exposure, physically or emotionally demanding.

_meta.fatigue_index_calc: TM's load = sum of slot loads across last 7 working shifts (from archive). Fatigue penalty in scorecard is roughly (fatigue_pts / 8) for high-load slots — soft pressure to rotate stretched TMs into easier work without preventing assignment.
_meta.tuning_note: Adjust these to match Brian's observation of which slots actually drain TMs. Initial values are a defensible starting point.
